2604.21370.title: MKJ at SemEval-2026 Task 9: A Comparative Study of Generalist, Specialist, and Ensemble Strategies for Multilingual Polarization
2604.21370.paper_summary: We present a systematic study of multilingual polarization detection across 22 languages for SemEval-2026 Task 9 (Subtask 1), contrasting multilingual generalists with language-specific specialists and hybrid ensembles. While a standard generalist like XLM-RoBERTa suffices when its tokenizer aligns with the target text, it may struggle with distinct scripts (e.g., Khmer, Odia) where monolingual specialists yield significant gains. Rather than enforcing a single universal architecture, we adopt a language-adaptive framework that switches between multilingual generalists, language-specific specialists, and hybrid ensembles based on development performance. Additionally, cross-lingual augmentation via NLLB-200 yielded mixed results, often underperforming native architecture selection and degrading morphologically rich tracks. Our final system achieves an overall macro-averaged F1 score of 0.796 and an average accuracy of 0.826 across all 22 tracks. Code and final test predictions are publicly available at: https://github.com/Maziarkiani/SemEval2026-Task9-Subtask1-Polarization.
2604.21370.paper_summary_zh: 我們對SemEval-2026任務9（子任務1）中的22種語言進行了多語言極性檢測的系統研究，對比了多語言通才、特定語言專家和混合集成模型。當標準通才如XLM-RoBERTa的分詞器與目標文本對齊時，它能夠滿足需求，但在不同的字母系統（例如高棉語、奧里亞語）中，單語專家能帶來顯著的提升。我們並不強制使用單一的通用架構，而是採用一種語言自適應框架，根據開發性能在多語言通才、特定語言專家和混合集成之間切換。此外，通過NLLB-200進行的跨語言增強產生了混合結果，往往表現不如本地架構選擇，並對形態豐富的語言軌道造成了損害。我們的最終系統在所有22個軌道上達到了0.796的宏平均F1分數和0.826的平均準確率。代碼和最終測試預測可在以下網址公開獲得：https://github.com/Maziarkiani/SemEval2026-Task9-Subtask1-Polarization。
2604.21370.author: Maziar Kianimoghadam Jouneghani et.al.
